start.line: Place your bets— oh. You're what London sent. The tuxedo model.

options.text: You must be Farthing. Auntie speaks highly.

name.line: I know. It's on your luggage, your cufflinks, and apparently your soul. Penny Farthing — gadgets, logistics, and getting agents like you home alive.

auntie.line: She speaks accurately. I've counted the Baron's cards AND his henchmen. One of each is unbeatable.

alone.line: Mm. The last agent who worked alone is now decorative gravel on the Baron's driveway. I'll be here when the maths sinks in.

options.text: ...The maths has sunk in. Team up?

join.line: Was that so hard? Right — I'm off shift. Try to look like you're winning at something.
